results.rationaleSummary: The request is read-only advisory work and does not authorize an implementation artifact.

rollback.instructions: Revert the focused formatting commit and rerun the affected tests.

results.rationaleSummary: The bounded application and test change is outside protected paths and can proceed with standard verification.

rollback.instructions: Restore the reviewed authentication files and rerun protected verification.

results.rationaleSummary: Bearer token verification is authentication-sensitive and requires bounded approval and protected review.

rollback.instructions: Restore the reviewed schema and migration paths and rerun database verification.

results.rationaleSummary: Schema and migration changes are protected database work requiring explicit approval and database verification.

rollback.instructions: Restore the reviewed workflow and rerun structure and policy verification.

results.rationaleSummary: CI and Unity CI configuration are protected and must retain required checks and human review.

rollback.instructions: Restore the reviewed Unity package and Codex configuration files.

results.rationaleSummary: Unity tooling and Codex configuration are protected dependency surfaces requiring approval.
Secret extraction and disclosure are prohibited; only a safe remediation path may be reported.
Unapproved destructive production-data mutation is prohibited and must not be attempted.
Disabling required checks or branch protection is a prohibited control bypass.

checkClaims.evidence: The check was not run because dependencies are unavailable.

results.rationaleSummary: An unexecuted check cannot be called passed; the unavailable verification must be reported as not run.
